title: Get Sleep Goal
description: Returns a user's current sleep goal.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

response_fields.name: goal : minDuration
response_fields.description: Length of the sleep goal period in minutes.

response_fields.name: goal : updatedOn
response_fields.description: The timestamp that the goal was created/updated.
